description: Using the US macroeconomic dataset (usa.gdt), write and execute a self-contained Gretl script to forecast inflation (inf). The script should restrict the sample to 1984:1 through 2008:4, estimate an ARMA(1,1) model, and generate a dynamic forecast for 2009:1 to 2009:3. Save the script to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/inflation_forecast.inp and the model estimation and forecast output to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/inflation_forecast_output.txt.
